user.title: OpenAQ – API Key
user.description: Enter your OpenAQ API key. You can get one for free at https://explore.openaq.org/register

location.title: OpenAQ – Select a location
location.description:
Showing stations within {radius_km} km from your home ({lat}, {lon}). Select one from the list, or enable **Enter location ID manually** to type an ID directly.

**How to find a location ID manually:**
1. Go to [explore.openaq.org](https://explore.openaq.org)
2. Browse or search for the monitoring station you want
3. Open the station detail page — the numeric ID appears in the URL: `explore.openaq.org/locations/**12345**`
4. Enter that number in the field below (integers only, e.g. `12345`)

error.invalid_auth: Invalid API key. Please check your credentials.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to OpenAQ API. Please try again.
error.location_not_found: No location found for the given ID. Make sure you copied the numeric ID from the URL on explore.openaq.org.
error.no_locations_nearby: No stations found within {radius_km} km. Try entering an ID manually (see instructions above).
error.geo_query_failed: Could not search for nearby stations. Check your connection or enter an ID manually.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the logs for details.
